name: World War II Begins
text: War erupts once more as nations mobilize on an unprecedented scale. The world must decide: stand against fascism, align with the Axis, or remain neutral in hopes of survival.

name: The Great War Begins
text: Europe erupts into war as alliances fracture and armies mobilize. The world watches as nations must decide: join the conflict, pick a side, or remain neutral.

name: The New Art of War
text: Your nation stands at the threshold of mass production, mechanized labor, and urban expansion. How will you guide this transformation?

name: The Machine Age Dawns
text: Your nation stands at the threshold of mass production, mechanized labor, and urban expansion. How will you guide this transformation?

name: Illuminating the Streets
text: With the advent of gas lighting, your cities can extend activity into the night. But how should this new technology be implemented?

name: The Rise of the Hunting Clubs
text: Upon discovering Hunting Dogs, nobles and industrial elites begin forming hunting societies. This sparks debate about land use, tradition, and modernization.
